Scenario: Valid user creation with all mandatory fields
Steps: 1. Navigate to Admin → User Management → Add;2. Select User Role (Admin);3. Select Employee Name;4. Select Status (Enabled);5. Enter Username;6. Enter Password;7. Enter Confirm Password;8. Click Save
Expected Result: New user is created and appears in User Management list

Steps: 1. Navigate to Admin → User Management → Add;2. Fill all mandatory fields with valid data;3. Enter Username that already exists in system;4. Enter Password and Confirm Password;5. Click Save
Expected Result: System displays "Username already exists" error and does not create duplicate

Steps: 1. Navigate to Admin → User Management → Add;2. Fill all mandatory fields;3. Enter Password in Password field;4. Enter different value in Confirm Password field;5. Click Save
Expected Result: System displays validation error preventing submission

Scenario: Non-Admin user cannot access Add User screen
Steps: 1. Login as Non-Admin user;2. Navigate to Admin module;3. Attempt to access User Management → Add
Expected Result: Add User screen is not accessible or shows permission error

Steps: 1. Navigate to Admin → User Management → Add;2. Leave at least one mandatory field empty;3. Click Save
Expected Result: System displays validation error for each empty required field

Steps: 1. Navigate to Admin → User Management → Add;2. Fill all mandatory fields;3. Enter Username with special characters (e.g.
Expected Result: user@#$);4. Enter matching Password fields;5. Click Save
Priority: System either accepts valid special chars or shows appropriate validation error
